question: Based on the stacked area chart showing quarterly store operations indicators, which statement about overall store performance is most appropriate?

options.A: Q1 shows the best overall performance because its indicators appear most balanced.
options.B: The chart cannot determine overall performance because it combines unrelated store metrics with different units into one total area.
options.C: Q1 clearly has the best overall performance because it has the lowest combined values across all indicators.
options.D: Q4 has the best overall performance because it has the highest total stacked area.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Revenue, Energy Usage, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
